availability.p: This information may not be reproduced without the explicit permission from the copyright holder. For copyright information, please contact Deryle Lonsdale at lonz@byu.edu

notesStmt.note: There are two versions of this prayer in Romanized Lushootseed.

app.rdg: A general prayer after adoration
GENERAL PRAYER TO BE SAID IN THE EVENING INSTEAD OF THE SACRAMENTS.
GENERAL PRAYER TO BE SAID IN THE EVENING INSTEAD OF THE SACRAMENTS
A general prayer after adoration
O Sherkh Siam,
O Sherk-Siam
툾u s팳톛q si툾ab,
툾u s팳톛q si툾ab,
klob chorh okwarhwats ta segwachelh alh banchelh le p캐pe eta sgwachelh serhsiam chelh les 칠v칡que!
kwawhat ku sgwachelh badchelh lepam, eku lesebek,
k퉝ax퉝at k퉝i sg퉝a툾c팳톛톫 badc팳톛톫 lepam, 툾i k퉝i lesebek,
쿹'ub c팳톛x퉝 툾uk퉝ax퉝ac t톛 sg퉝a툾c팳톛톫 ha툾톫 badc팳톛톫 lepam, 툾i t톛 sg퉝a툾c팳톛톫 six퉝si툾abc팳톛톫 k퉝i lesebek,
eta serhsiam chelh lepl캡, eta mok gwal ass캐kw assilhtamerh serhs캶캒m,
eku leple, kwawhat ta gwalh astsaku atsilhtalbihu halh sihusiam,
툾i k퉝i leple, k퉝ax퉝at ta g퉝톛톫 툾톛c톛k퉢퉝 툾aci톫talbix퉝 ha툾톫 six퉝si툾ab,
툾i t톛 sg퉝a툾c팳톛톫 leple, 툾i t톛 b톛k퉢퉝 g퉝톛톫 툾톛c톛k퉢퉝 툾aci톫talbix퉝 six퉝si툾ab,
oshabets ta gwalh bok durhstewilh sk콞k콆,
oshabid ta Leglis ;
툾us팳톛bid t톛 Leglis ;
툾us팳톛byic t톛 g퉝톛톫 b톛k퉢퉝 dx퉝st'iwi톫 sq퉢퉝u툾q퉢퉝u툾,
oshabets ta bok siayachelh, etamok ests'h캡lh, eta sheb캐mchelh,
oshabid ta siayachelh eta eshedchelh eta shebadchelh;
툾us팳톛bid t톛 sya툾ya툾c팳톛톫 툾i t톛 툾iis팳톛dc팳톛톫 툾i t톛 s팳톛badc팳톛톫;
툾us팳톛byic t톛 b톛k퉢퉝 sya툾ya툾c팳톛톫 툾i t톛b톛k퉢퉝 툾iis팳톛dc팳톛톫 툾i t톛 s팳톛badc팳톛톫
alh kwas asshots kmok alh assilhtamerh!
halh ku adsasterdhu ku halh atsilhtalbihu;
ha툾톫 k퉝i ads톛st톛x팳dx퉝 k퉝i ha툾톫 툾aci톫talbix퉝 ;
ha툾톫 k퉝i ads톛shuyuts k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 ha툾톫 툾aci톫talbix퉝 ;
oyod 캐lh ta sa assilhtamerh!
hoyud halh ku sa atsilhtalbihu;
huyud ha툾톫 k퉝i sa툾 툾aci톫talbix퉝;
huyud ha툾톫 t톛 sa툾 툾aci톫talbix퉝;
oyod alh kwe rhach atasoshababdu-assilht캡merch!
hoyud halh ku asoshababdhuil ku rechs;
huyud ha툾톫 k퉝i 툾톛s툾us팳톛babdx퉝il k퉝i x팳톛c팳s;
huyud ha툾톫 k퉝i x팳톛c팳 툾톛 t톛 툾톛s툾us팳톛babdx퉝 툾aci톫talbix퉝!
oshabed t캐srhelh assilht캒merh!
'tlob chahu asterdhu ku dohuszoku;
쿹'ub c팳톛x퉝 툾톛st톛x팳dx퉝 k퉝i d톛x퉝s퉋uq퉢퉝;
툾us팳톛bid t톛 툾톛sx팳톛톫 툾aci톫talbix퉝!
Klob cha(?) asterhdux ta tsadelh durhs콄l콆lh!
kwawhat ta tsahadilh ahu satebedab;
k퉝ax퉝at ta cadi톫톛x퉝 s툾at톛b톛d톛b;
쿹'ub c팳톛x퉝 툾톛stix팳dx퉝 t톛 c톛di톫 d톛x퉝s툾ulu톫!
kwarhwat ta ts캐delh asatbedamorh!
k퉝ax퉝at t톛 c톛di톫 툾톛s툾at톛b톛d톛x퉝!
oshabetobolh debalh, 콆ya kha kwetlo spedalek helh ek sw칡-w칡 chelh!
'tlob chahu o oshabitobolh boku debalh krad ku spedaleku chalh eta swhewhechelh ;
쿹'ub c팳톛x퉝 툾u툾us팳톛bitubu톫 b톛k퉢퉝 dib톛톫 ?? k퉝i spiitalik퉝c팳톛톫 툾i t톛 sx퉝i툾x퉝i툾c팳톛톫;
툾us팳톛bitubu톫 dib톛톫, huya b톛k퉢퉝 dib톛톫 ?? k퉝i 톫uspiitalik퉝c팳톛톫 툾i t톛 sx퉝i툾x퉝i툾c팳톛톫;
oshabetchorh ta welsa-saku assilhtamerh oyod ak tledorh oyielh assaku,
oshabid ta whalh stsaku atsilhtalbihu hoyiyid a gwa dahu hoyils astsaku
툾us팳톛bid t톛 x퉝톛톫 ?? 툾aci톫talbix퉝, huyiyid 툾톛 g퉝톛d톛x퉝shuyils ??
툾us팳톛bid c팳톛x퉝 t톛 x퉝톛톫 ?? 툾aci톫talbix퉝, huyud 툾톛 k퉝i 톫ud톛x퉝 huyils ???
klob chorh ab캸캡tsud ta gwalh kto atbed skwadad,
balits gwalh astsaku skayu tskwadad,
balyic g퉝톛톫 ?? skayu툾 퉋톛k퉢퉝adad,
쿹'ub c팳톛x퉝 ??? g퉝톛톫 쿹'u툾at톛b톛d 퉋톛k퉢퉝adad,
klob chorh ukudied ta ts캐delh etta mok uatebed assilhtamerh ata tsid캐tem!
kwedied aku sgwas seles halgwa tolal sahu krpaleku.
k퉝톛dyid 툾톛 k퉝i g퉝톛s seles h톛lg퉝톛 tul퉢툾al ??
쿹'ub c팳톛x퉝 툾uk퉝톛dyid t톛 c톛di톫 툾톛 t톛 b톛k퉢퉝 툾u 툾at톛b톛d 툾aci톫talbix퉝 툾톛 t톛 ???
Klob assista!
'Tlob asista.
쿹'ub 툾톛s툾ist톛툾.
쿹'ub 툾톛s툾ist톛툾.
